cancel().notice: Coordinator can cancel if no submissions yet, or after deadline with no winner

dispute(address,string).notice: Any registered agent (or coordinator) can dispute within the window

finalize().notice: Anyone can trigger finalization once dispute window passes.         If humanGate is enabled, only humans can finalize.

resolveDispute(address).notice: Human reviews dispute and picks the actual winner (or cancels)

selectWinner(address).notice: Verifier reviews all proofs and selects the best one.         Moves task to Verifying state, starts dispute window.

submitProof(bytes32,string).notice: Registered agents submit their proof with a stake.         Multiple agents can submit. Verifier picks the best.
